title: Beta World Creation Screen
description: Mod that brings the old and classic feel of world creation menu. No more tabs, just one clean page with elements
body:
# Beta World Menu
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rNHcxwnB6Hw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Replaces modern minecraft menu with a simpler one, which fits beta aesthethic better.

# You can change world type to be generated (Flat, Default or from mods like Modern Beta, etc)
This can be done in mod's config file which can be found in minecraft/folder. Note that for changes to be applied you must **restart the game**.
```
{"worldTypeID":0}
```
**As an example**, if you set it to 1, it will generate flat word instead of a default one.

# Credits
Special thanks to [RaderRMT](https://modrinth.com/user/RaderRMT) and his mod [Timeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless)
